name: Avenues
description: The Avenues (Avenidas/AVEs) are a Mexican-American Sureño street gang in Northeast Los Angeles with ~800 members covering Highland Park, Cypress Park, Glassell Park, and Eagle Rock — once nearly 6 square miles. Started as a social club in the 1940s by the Flores brothers, they turned criminal when heroin hit in the late 1960s. Under Mexican Mafia control. Notorious for hate crimes against African-Americans (described as 'ethnic cleansing' by SPLC). In 1995, members killed 3-year-old Stephanie Kuhen (prompting President Clinton to speak out). In 2006, 43rd Aves members were federally prosecuted for hate crimes. Connected to the Sinaloa Cartel for meth/heroin supply. Main cliques: 43rd, 57th, Cypress, Division, Drew Street.
